code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut total = 0
  mut current = 0
  mut has_digit = false
  mut stopped = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)

  while i < n and not stopped
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end

    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
      has_digit = true
    else
      if has_digit
        if total + current > 100
          stopped = true
        else
          total = total + current
        end
        current = 0
        has_digit = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  if has_digit and not stopped
    if total + current <= 100
      total = total + current
    end
  end

  println("total=#{total}")
end
